ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "in_stock" INTEGER /* Whether the product is in stock or not */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the product */,
  "created" INTEGER /* Year the product was created */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the product (in minutes) */,
  "spoken_languages" TEXT /* Spoken languages of the product */,
  "subtitle_languages" TEXT /* Subtitle languages of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "promotion" TEXT /* Promotion type (e.g., discount, bundle) */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Order type (e.g., physical, digital) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Blu-ray, DVD, Collectible) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the product (e.g., Action, Fantasy) */,
  "series" TEXT /* Name of the series the product belongs to */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for inventory management */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_publisher FOREIGN KEY ("publisher") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the publisher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 code for the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_languages" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order should be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address for billing purposes */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the customer when placing the order */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the customer's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product at the time of order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold level to trigger a reorder */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last restocked */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number provided by the shipping carrier */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or review text */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)
